research_meta.title: Competitor Pricing Re-check - Fulfillment Operators Ukraine
research_meta.purpose: Verify and correct pricing data for TOP fulfillment operators article
research_meta.note: WebFetch and Bash curl were denied; data extracted from search result snippets and cached page text. Some pricing pages render data dynamically (JavaScript calculators) which search snippets cannot fully capture.

1_sender.correction: INCORRECT - Sender HAS a public pricing page at senderukraine.com/en/prices with detailed tariffs

shipment_processing.model: Volume-based (price decreases as monthly order count increases)
shipment_processing.note: Rate auto-adjusts based on orders shipped in last 30 days - higher volume = lower rate
shipment_processing.confidence: HIGH - confirmed in multiple search results

storage.note: Storage price also volume-dependent, decreases with higher order counts

minimum_monthly_payment.confidence: HIGH - confirmed in multiple search results

free_trial.first_orders_free: First 10-20 orders free picking/packing (sources vary: 10 or 20)

reception_intake.subsequent: Not publicly specified in search results

returns.price: Not found in search results - likely included in tariff or quoted individually

additional_fees.multi_item_surcharge: +2 UAH per additional item in order

1_sender.calculator_note: Dynamic calculator on pricing page - calculates tariff based on expected shipments/month and storage volume

integrations.special_note: Deep integration with Horoshop - auto order sync and inventory updates

1_sender.own_courier: Yes, own courier service in Kyiv

2_unipost.has_public_prices: PARTIAL - calculator available, downloadable price list mentioned

shipment_processing.model: Calculator-based, not publicly listed as fixed number
shipment_processing.note: Site has a cost calculator and downloadable price list (PDF), but exact numbers are not indexed by search engines - likely rendered dynamically or behind interaction
shipment_processing.confidence: LOW - could not extract exact numbers

integrations.crm: Available via API, integrates with popular CMS and CRM systems

order_processing.note: Exact per-order fulfillment processing fee varies by shipment category. Base fulfillment costs: documents 15 UAH, up to large parcel 40 UAH
order_processing.confidence: MEDIUM - extracted from search snippets referencing the official page

reception_intake.goods_acceptance_placement: FREE (acceptance and placement on warehouse shelves is free)

storage.model: Per day, based on actual volume used
storage.free_period_parcels: 7 calendar days free storage (for parcels, not pallets)

delivery_discount.fulfillment_discount: 5% discount on current NP shipping rates
delivery_discount.conditions: Must have signed contract for both transportation and fulfillment logistics
delivery_discount.applies_to: Main service only, not additional services
delivery_discount.confidence: HIGH - confirmed by Forbes.ua and NP official

pricing_verified.free_trial: Not specified as a named program, but free acceptance makes entry easy

returns.price: Not separately specified in search results

additional_fees.fulfillment_discount_exclusions: Does not apply to tires/wheels, items over 120cm, or unboxed goods

delivery_tariffs_april_2026.nationwide_branch_to_branch: 135 UAH (up to 10 kg, increased from 80 UAH as of April 13, 2026)

integrations.odoo_module: Odoo WMS Nova Poshta Fulfillment module available

3_nova_poshta_fulfillment.unique: Fulfillment warehouses located directly on NP sorting terminals - halves delivery time
3_nova_poshta_fulfillment.poland_fulfillment: Also launched fulfillment service in Poland for EU access

shipment_processing.confidence: HIGH - confirmed across multiple pages on their site

reception_intake.confidence: MEDIUM - found in one search result

storage.note: This is per square meter, not cubic meter. Also listed separately: warehouse rental from 400 UAH/m2/month

returns.confidence: MEDIUM - found in one search result

pricing_verified.free_trial: Not found - no explicit test period mentioned

additional_fees.multi_item: +1 UAH per item after 3 items in one shipment

4_cherdak_4erdak.tariff_packages: Site mentions tariff packages but specific package names (S/M/L/XL) not confirmed
4_cherdak_4erdak.warehouse_area: Individual boxes from 1 m3 to 50 m2
locations: Kyiv (multiple: Obolon, Poznyaki, Left Bank, Right Bank)

shipment_processing.model: Single simple tariff - one flat fee per shipment

storage.note: Free goods storage regardless of duration

packaging_materials.included: Courier packaging, tape, and stretch wrap included at no extra cost

5_lp_sklad.calculator_note: No calculator - single flat tariff makes calculator unnecessary

integrations.specific_platforms: Not listed by name in search results

5_lp_sklad.note: Extremely aggressive pricing - lowest on Ukrainian market. Model viability at 4.95 UAH/shipment raises questions about service quality and sustainability.

shipment_processing.structure: Two-part tariff: (1) storage per m3 + (2) picking/shipping per shipment
shipment_processing.note: Tariff is individual for each client, calculated on request
shipment_processing.confidence: HIGH - structure confirmed, exact numbers unavailable

storage.model: Per 1 cubic meter of goods in warehouse
storage.note: Pay only for actual volume stored, not fixed location

integrations.wms: Modern WMS system with automatic task assignment

6_fast_lane_group.security: 24/7 security, video surveillance, automatic fire extinguishing
6_fast_lane_group.note: Located in Kharkiv region - proximity to conflict zone is a significant risk factor for clients. No public pricing - quote only.

shipment_processing.model: Individual solutions with stable tariffs fixed in contract

integrations.note: Full IT integration available but specifics not public

locations: Krasyliv, Kyiv region (17 km from Kyiv)
7_zammler.offices: 17 offices in Ukraine, Poland, China, Kazakhstan
unique_features: First fulfillment operator in Ukraine (pioneer since 2015)
7_zammler.note: Enterprise-oriented operator. Pricing is strictly contract-based and not publicly available. Best for medium-to-large businesses.

rows.shipment: 15-40 UAH (depends on type: docs 15, parcel up to 40)
rows.storage: 15 UAH/m3/day (~450 UAH/m3/month). 7 days free (parcels), 3 days free (pallets)

sender.corrected: WRONG. Sender has a full public pricing page at senderukraine.com/en/prices with a dynamic calculator. Example: at 500 orders/month tier, picking+shipping = 22 UAH/order + 2 UAH/extra item, storage = 500 UAH/m3/month. Minimum 2,600 UAH/month for <99 orders.

lp_sklad_4_95_uah.corrected: CONFIRMED. LP-Sklad does charge 4.95 UAH per shipment flat rate with free storage, free returns, and 100 free test shipments. No subscription fee.

cherdak_19_uah.corrected: CONFIRMED. 4erdak charges from 19 UAH per shipment (up to 3 items), +1 UAH per extra item. Storage 400 UAH/m2/month. Reception 2 UAH/unit. Returns 5 UAH/unit.
cherdak_19_uah.severity: None - claim was accurate, now enriched with additional details

nova_poshta_fulfillment.corrected: ENRICHED. Reception: 5 UAH/box or 5 UAH/pallet. Acceptance/placement: FREE. Storage: 15 UAH/m3/day (~450 UAH/m3/month). 7 days free storage (parcels), 3 days (pallets). Order processing: 15-40 UAH depending on parcel type. 5% delivery discount for fulfillment clients. April 2026 delivery tariff increase to 135 UAH nationwide.
nova_poshta_fulfillment.severity: MEDIUM - significantly more data now available

unipost.previous: Prices not publicly listed, calculator on site
unipost.corrected: CONFIRMED partially. Unipost has a calculator at unipost.ua/calculate-2/ and a downloadable price list, but exact numbers are not indexed by search engines. Personal cabinet at my.unipost.com.ua. Offers Rozetka Fulfillment as a specialty service.
unipost.severity: LOW - previous assessment was mostly correct

fast_lane_group.corrected: CONFIRMED. FLG has NO public pricing. Two-part tariff structure (storage/m3 + shipping/order) but exact numbers are individual per client. Contact fulfillment@flg.one for quotes.

zammler.corrected: CONFIRMED. Zammler has NO public pricing. Enterprise contract-based model with stable tariffs fixed in contract. Best for medium-to-large businesses.

key_findings.cheapest_per_shipment: LP-Sklad at 4.95 UAH (but questionable service scope at this price)
key_findings.cheapest_with_full_service: Cherdak at 19 UAH (from) or Sender at ~22 UAH (at 500 orders/month)
key_findings.best_free_trial: LP-Sklad (100 free shipments + free storage + free returns)
key_findings.nova_poshta_advantage: Free acceptance + 5% delivery discount + 7 days free storage + largest network
key_findings.nova_poshta_tariff_increase_april_2026: Nationwide delivery increased to 135 UAH (from 80 UAH) as of April 13, 2026

sender: Full tariff tier table (rates for 100, 300, 500, 1000, 2000+ orders/month) - requires visiting the dynamic calculator page
unipost: ALL exact pricing numbers - requires visiting calculator page or downloading PDF price list
nova_poshta: Exact fulfillment order processing fee per order type (only ranges confirmed)
cherdak: Tariff package names and details (if S/M/L/XL exist)
lp_sklad: What exactly is included in 4.95 UAH (scope of service)

recommendation_for_article.use_confirmed_prices_only: Only use pricing data marked as HIGH confidence in the article
recommendation_for_article.for_operators_without_public_prices: State 'individual calculation' or 'by request' - do not invent numbers
recommendation_for_article.sender_correction_critical: Must correct the claim that Sender has no public prices - they DO have a full pricing page
recommendation_for_article.comparative_angle: Focus comparison on the 4 operators with public pricing: Sender, NP Fulfillment, Cherdak, LP-Sklad
recommendation_for_article.mtp_positioning: MTP at 18-26 UAH/shipment is competitive with Sender (~22 UAH at similar volumes) and cheaper than NP Fulfillment (15-40 UAH + higher storage). MTP advantage: blackout resilience, 30-sec processing, 10+ years experience
